metaSummary: Pokémon Champions — Regulation Set M-B en vigueur depuis le 16 juin 2026 (jusqu'au 1er septembre). Les Pokémon de la M-A restent jouables, rejoints par de nouvelles Méga-Évolutions : Mega Sceptile, Mega Blaziken, Mega Swampert, Mega Mawile et Mega Staraptor. Le jeu est désormais disponible sur iOS et Android, avec le lancement de la saison Ranked M-3 et d'un nouveau Battle Pass. Côté circuit officiel, le NAIC 2026 (Nouvelle-Orléans, dernier événement en Reg. M-A) a été remporté par Francesco Pio Pero. La Monthly Challenge Series de juin 2026 est en cours.
metaSummary_en: Pokémon Champions — Regulation Set M-B is in effect from 16 June 2026 to 1 September. All Regulation M-A Pokémon remain eligible, joined by new Mega Evolutions: Mega Sceptile, Mega Blaziken, Mega Swampert, Mega Mawile and Mega Staraptor. The game is now available on iOS and Android, with Ranked Battles Season M-3 and a new Battle Pass underway. On the official circuit, the 2026 NAIC (New Orleans, the last event played under Reg. M-A) was won by Francesco Pio Pero. The June 2026 Monthly Challenge Series is live.

recentResults.notable: Équipe Mega Charizard Y + Mega Aerodactyl

newsFeed: Regulation Set M-B is live (16 June – 1 Sept 2026): new Megas including Sceptile, Blaziken, Swampert, Mawile and Staraptor.
Pokémon Champions is now available on iOS and Android.
Ranked Battles Season M-3 and a new Battle Pass have begun.
Francesco Pio Pero wins the 2026 North America International Championships (NAIC).
Sign-ups are open for the Pokémon Champions Monthly Challenge Series June 2026.
Watch the official 2026 NAIC VGC broadcast on the Play! Pokémon YouTube channel.
